title: schizocarphus nervosus
intro: Schizocarphus nervosus, also known as the nervous marbles or nervous weed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety and stress-related disorders due to its sedative and anxiolytic effects. The health benefits of Schizocarphus nervosus include reducing symptoms of insomnia, promoting relaxation, and alleviating muscle spasms. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used in combination with other calming herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
